class jaxmodel.HighLevelNLPBuilder(dtype=<class 'jax.numpy.float64'>)[source]

Bases: object

High-level modeling interface built on top of NLPBuilder.

This class keeps the same functionality as the low-level API but provides easier methods for users to define common model structures.

add_variable(name: str, size: int) → HighLevelNLPBuilder[source]
add_parameter(name: str, size: int) → HighLevelNLPBuilder[source]
set_objective(objective_fun) → HighLevelNLPBuilder[source]
set_quadratic_objective(Q: Array, c: Array, constant: float = 0.0) → HighLevelNLPBuilder[source]
add_affine_equality(*, var_name: str, A: Array, rhs_const: Array | float = 0.0, param_terms: list[tuple[Array, str]] | None = None, name: str = 'affine_eq') → HighLevelNLPBuilder[source]
add_affine_inequality(*, var_name: str, C: Array, rhs_const: Array | float = 0.0, param_terms: list[tuple[Array, str]] | None = None, name: str = 'affine_ineq') → HighLevelNLPBuilder[source]
add_nonlinear_equality(fun: Callable, name: str = 'nonlinear_eq') → HighLevelNLPBuilder[source]
add_nonlinear_inequality(fun: Callable, name: str = 'nonlinear_ineq') → HighLevelNLPBuilder[source]

set_affine_lower_bound(*, var_name: str, param_name: str, M: Array, c: Array) → HighLevelNLPBuilder[source]
set_affine_upper_bound(*, var_name: str, param_name: str, M: Array, c: Array) → HighLevelNLPBuilder[source]
